creator: uspoerlein@gmail.com
text:
- Make /usr/local/etc/rc.d/ejabberd status work
- Make /usr/local/etc/rc.d/ejabberd reload work
- Make /usr/local/etc/rc.d/ejabberd restart actually restart all of ejabberd processes
- Remove unnecessary chdir()
- pet portlint(1)

Port maintainer (shaun@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77

How-To-Repeat: 
Try running /usr/local/etc/rc.d/ejabberd status, it will complain about unknown directive.
